tags.evidence: the group's awareness shifts, and everyone attends
walks where no one talks
they gesture with their head or their eyes
makes the grief possible to hold
That grief is real and that grief
You wire up the feed. You watch
the defense is also happening in places
You could feel it before you got there
Hold it long enough to see
to see what it is saying
Do not let the next forward motion
To enclose land is to extract aura
you stop and listen to what the forest is saying
the grief that rises when a place
the moment you stop and listen
meets to coordinate the week's food distribution
They stayed. They kept meeting
naming their housework as labor for the first time
neighbors organize systematic support for elderly
building mutual support systems outside institutional care
People who care for each other learn to read
maintained a relationship to the land
making up silly little voices for the birds
listen as if they were actually talking
little phrases that crystallized our guesses
We were learning to attend
when we addressed them — kindly, directly
part of a network of attention
They are telling you something, specifically
I see the processes: the relationship
It can be built. It can be cultivated
systematic practice of sustained attention
it reads you while you are reading it
meditation, tracking, ceremony, psychedelics, grief-work
those things are legible
You can grieve a meadow you have walked
whose specific birds you know
Your role is guest, not director
Move slowly. Make no sudden movements
Speak quietly if at all. Don't reach
Watch what happens after you've acknowledged them
whether you spoke, nodded, or simply stopped
Relax first. Watch what follows
We stopped — walk, conversation, everything
stood there for fifteen or twenty minutes
We check it periodically
addressed kindly and directly, as you would address a neighbor
Play is the name real wisdom hides behind
instead of looking away, they moved toward it
what would it take to refuse it?
when you see it as policy, the question changes
read the language the living world writes in soil
fully present, releasing the insistence
a particular quality of quietness
releasing the insistence on what you expect
learned what he knows in the Tzutujil Mayan village
The descent was real. The transformation
watching life — which amounts to the same thing
kept track of who belonged on the street
held the spare key for neighbors
